_comment: Manual overrides for word-level glosses. Keys are Syriac word forms. These take priority over compositional glossing.
_section_compound_particles: --- Compound Particles with ܕ and ܘ ---
_section_verbs: --- Common Verbs (3ms Perfect and frequent forms) ---

ܠܥܠܡ ܥܠܡܝܢ.es: por los siglos de los siglos

ܒܫܡ ܡܪܢ.en: in the name of our Lord
ܒܫܡ ܡܪܢ.es: en el nombre de nuestro Señor

ܒܫܡ ܐܒܐ.en: in the name of the Father

ܢܦܘܩ.en: he will go out/let him go out
